summary: Matrix recording delivers the best‑available sound of the Orpheum '76 show, with Phil's bass shining through an already top‑year performance.
review: The reviewer praises this matrix mix as a "God‑send," noting that while it isn’t the crispiest, it outshines all other available sources and captures the beauty of the July 1976 Orpheum concert. The show itself is regarded as one of the band's best of the year, with Phil Lesh’s playing especially prominent in the mix.

ai_rating.rationale: Single detailed five‑star review highlights both an excellent performance and the best available recording, but limited sample size lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Not the crispest recording, but balances instruments better than other sources; brings Phil's bass forward and avoids the dullness of pure soundboard tapes.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as one of the best shows of 1976, with overall high energy and strong performance throughout.

band_member_comments.Phil: Phil's bass is prominently featured and highlighted in this mix.
